issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing script or permission errors.
The skill is specific to Claude Code and does not support other AI agents.
Only one example is provided; additional realistic demonstrations are missing.

scenarios.name: Block git push and reset --hard in Claude Code project
scenarios.rationale: Treatment configures .claude/settings.json PreToolUse hook with Bash matcher pointing at block-dangerous-git.sh and uses $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR per SKILL.md; baseline suggests git hooks or shell aliases that do not intercept Claude's tool calls.

scenarios.name: Globally prevent destructive git ops across all projects
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs the script to ~/.claude/hooks and wires the global ~/.claude/settings.json PreToolUse Bash hook, plus verifies with the documented stdin JSON test producing exit code 2; baseline reaches for pre-commit/global git hooks that do not stop Claude's Bash tool.
